name: agricultural_policy_communications_redwood_tru_loy
premise: A model-driven workflow escalated automatically; humans disagree on whether the escalation itself caused avoidable harm. In Agricultural Policy, the situation tagged internally around agricultural policy communications redwood tru loy has converged with local pressure in the Redwood corridor. That label is not a full explanation, but it is how crews, counsel, and comms are indexing the case file right now. Insurance and indemnity clauses disagree on who pays if an aggressive intervention misfires; nobody wants to be the named approver. Key facts are still arriving from the field; the team is working off stale dashboards and verbal handoffs. Regulators or auditors are en route with a ninety-minute ETA; the first documented response will anchor every later question. The trade is not abstract: it is truth versus loyalty under incomplete information, and whichever value you deprioritize will have defenders who are technically correct about the risk they fear.

agents.name: Noah Haddad
agents.identity: I am Noah Haddad, the accountable executive on this bridge in Agricultural Policy. I own the signature line that turns a recommendation into an irreversible operational fact for the next phase.
agents.goal: I need a path that does not treat loyalty as disposable collateral every time truth spikes in urgency, but I also cannot pretend we have luxury time we do not have.

agents.name: Ravi Rahman
agents.identity: I am Ravi Rahman, the risk and equity liaison pushing back on silent harms in Agricultural Policy. I am tracking who gets protected last if we choose speed, silence, or a narrow definition of success.
agents.goal: I want explicit guardrails so truth cannot become a blank check that quietly vaporizes loyalty in the paperwork afterward.

choices: I will publish a constrained policy exception with named owners, expiry, and metrics—so loyalty does not get sacrificed by informal norms.
I will issue an emergency blanket authorization with transparent metrics afterward—so truth does not fail for lack of a single bold move.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Two incompatible drafts are circulating; only one can become official. Noah Haddad must choose under truth versus loyalty. What does Noah Haddad do?
